text: The mind is the athlete. The body is simply the means it uses.
author: Kareem Abdul-Jabbar

text: You are not your feelings. You are the one who observes them.
Suffer the pain of discipline or suffer the pain of regret.
Champions are not made in gyms. They are made from something deep inside them.
author: Muhammad Ali

text: Control what you can control. Let go of what you cannot.
You have power over your mind, not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: It never gets easier. You just get stronger.
Waste no more time arguing what a good man should be. Be one.
author: Marcus Aurelius

text: The first and best victory is to conquer self.
author: Plato

text: Do not pray for an easy life. Pray for the strength to endure a difficult one.
author: Bruce Lee

text: He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

text: Most people want comfort. Champions want growth.
Your future self is watching. Act accordingly.
Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.
